messages.content: prima
PRIMAAAA
the nscc lady just emailed u
she wants 20 models
TWENTY
thats like $1200 right?? 🔥🔥
I just saw it!!
yes $60 per model x 20
prima youre literally killing it 🔥🔥🔥
biggest order yet fr fr
I know I'm shaking lol
ok I need you to do something
push the whitening posts this week, the before and afters
lets ride this momentum
on it 💯
i already got 3 reels queued up from last weeks sessions
should i boost the post from saturday?? the one w the college girls
yes do it. keep budget under $20 tho
bet
also ur insta got like 40 new followers this week
wait really?? nice
i told u the reels strategy would work 😤
ok gotta go back to work, call you tonight about the invoice
k prima go get that bread 🙌
prima
can i ask u something
whats up
ok so ive been thinking about dental hygiene as a career
like for real not just as a thought
how much did ur program cost
omg mateo
thats amazing
ok so the program was about 25k for two years. theres scholarships and financial aid tho so it depends
thats not bad honestly
what about jobs tho like is it hard to find work
literally every dentist in nashville is hiring hygienists rn. starting pay is like 55-60k
and most offices do 4 day weeks
wait 4 day weeks??
making 60k??
yep fridays off is pretty standard
prima thats literally the dream
what prereqs do u need
anatomy, chem, bio. u probably have some of those from ur degree already
want me to look up the mtsu and tsu programs? i can send u the links
yes plsss 🙏🙏
ill email u everything this week
ur the best prima fr fr
hey u coming for thanksgiving right
prima!!
obviously
what u making tho
turkey, mole, cornbread dressing, sweet potato pie
the mole 🔥🔥🔥
elenas recipe right??
yeah but im putting my own spin on it
lol u say that every year prima
bring something to drink. not just mountain dew.
i'll bring wine like a grown up 🍷
sure you will
rude 😤
omw!!
stuck on 65 tho 😩
turkey just went in. hurry up
got the wine prima told u 🍷
prima
can u look at this
its my application essay for the dental hygiene program
dont judge too hard lol
omg yes send it!
ok reading now give me like 20 min
take ur time 🙏
ok this is really good mateo. seriously
the part about watching ur abuela take care of her teeth with no resources is powerful
couple things tho
second paragraph is all over the place. pick one story and go deeper instead of trying to cover everything
also u spelled hygienist wrong lol its ie not ei
lmaooo
ok ill fix those
should i mention that u work in the field
yeah def say you have family in dental healthcare. shows u understand the day to day
bet. ill update it tonight
send me the updated version when ur done
will do prima ty 💯
look what I printed this weekend
wait
what IS that
geometric vases. followed a tutorial then just started experimenting
prima those are actually fire 🔥
wait are u selling these
no these are just for fun
playing with spiral vase mode and different layer heights
ngl those would sell on etsy
maybe eventually. right now im just messing around
the blue one is sick
that one took 11 hours lol
ELEVEN HOURS 💀
look at the detail on the spirals
ok yeah thats insane
u should do a timelapse reel for ur personal page
im not putting my face on reels lol
no face just the printer doing its thing
people eat that up fr
maybe. anyway dont you have finals coming up
why u gotta bring that up 😤
go study!!
fine 📚
ok don't freak out
what
I've been looking at san juan for our anniversary
like.. a trip
YOOO prima that would be incredible!!
wait for real??
yes for real. march 25-30
I found flights on jetblue for like $310 round trip
thats actually not bad
Don't say ANYTHING to ANYONE
especially not tomas
i got u prima 🤐
I've had like 17 tabs open for an hour
lmaoooo thats so on brand 💀
prima
i think im gonna do it
dental hygiene it is
MATEO
im so proud of you
the campus visit sealed it fr
that lab was sick
and dr chen was chill af
yeah she was great. she clearly loves teaching
she said w my marketing background i could do patient education stuff too
thats actually huge. the field needs people who can communicate not just clean teeth
ay dios prima im actually gonna be a dental hygienist
te quiero. this family is gonna have TWO dental pros
ok I just sent you the full itinerary
check your email
checking
PRIMA
this is INSANE
paddleboarding is a MUST
also bad bunny??
shes gonna die 💀💀
right?? I got section 210 tickets
and the airbnb is like right on the water in condado
el yunque too?? 🔥🔥
and marmalade for dinner on the same day
thats the best day ive ever seen
I know. I've been planning this since january
prima te quiero this is amazing
thanks primo. remember, not a word
hey so ive been thinking
theres a woman in my paddle league whos a dental hygienist. been doing it like 15 years at a practice in brentwood
want me to connect u two? she could tell u what its really like day to day
omg yes
whats her name
tamara wells. super nice. let me text her and see if shes cool with it
prima u always coming thru 🙏
ill let u know what she says
ty ty 🙏
ok tamara said shed love to talk to u. im gonna give her ur number
lets gooo 🔥
tell her im not weird i promise 😂
lol ill tell her ur mostly not weird
rude 💀
prima ok so i got this amazing before and after from the brentwood lady
can i tag your personal account in the post? it would get so much more reach than just the business page
also this dental office in franklin wants to know if you do in-office whitening demos. should i give them your work email or the gmail?
gmail
never the work one
bet
and the tag question?
no
biz only
k
got it
ttyl prima
Hey girl! Guess what showed up today 🏓
what
Joola Ben Johns Hyperion! Finally pulled the trigger 🔥
omg thats like a $200 paddle
Worth every penny. You still rocking that Franklin? 😂
yes and it works fine lol see you at 7
That was SO fun! We crushed it in game 3 🔥
yes we did. my arm is gonna hate me tomorrow
Worth it! Same time next week? 🏓
wouldn't miss it
Hey girl! You missed league night tonight. Everything ok?
Sorry, just wasn't feeling it this week. Had a rough couple days
No worries at all! We missed you though. See you next Wednesday?
yeah probably
Hey girl! You coming tonight? Craig said they have court 3 reserved
yeah I'll be there. running a little late, crazy day
Take your time! Craig and Denise want to do mixed doubles tonight
ooh fun. Denise is good
She's been working on that backhand spin. Watch out 😂
great now I'm nervous lol
You'll be fine! See you in 15! 🏓
hey can I ask you a favor
Of course girl! What's up?
if Elena asks what I'm doing the week of March 25, can you just say I mentioned a dental conference or something
Ooh a surprise trip?? That's so cute!
Puerto Rico. Our anniversary.
JENNIFER.
She's going to LOVE it! 🎉
I've been planning it since january lol
Oh I know you. Seventeen tabs deep right? 😂
ok how does EVERYONE know about the tabs thing
Because we know you! 😂
anyway yes. bad bunny concert, el yunque, paddleboarding, the whole thing
That sounds absolutely incredible. She's going to cry
that's the goal
Your secret's safe with me! I won't say a word
thank you. you're the best
Hey girl! My coworker Dena has been asking about teeth whitening ever since she saw my results. Can I give her your info?
omg yes! tell her to DM the Nashville Bright Smiles page on instagram
Perfect! I'll send her the link tonight
thank you! you're my best referral source lol
I mean look at these teeth!! Of course I tell people
She works at Pinnacle though so she might want a Saturday appointment
thats fine I can do saturdays
hey but Ronda
please dont mention it at the office ok
Girl I know I know. You've told me a hundred times haha
I know I'm sorry, I just cant have Dr R finding out
I get it. My lips are sealed! I only refer people outside the office
you're the best
Are we still on for league night Wednesday?
yes! I need to hit something this week
That's the spirit! See you Wednesday! 🏓
Hey! we are going paddleboarding at Percy Priest Saturday if u wanna come
Oh I wish! My mom is coming in this weekend. Have fun though!
no worries! next time
Don't bail on me tonight! 😂
lol I'm not bailing
Good because you disappeared for like a month! 😂
I know I know. january was rough
No judgment girl. We missed you though 💪
literally putting my shoes on right now
That's what I like to hear! See you soon! 🏓
OK I have to say it. You were RUSTY in game 1 😂
oh trust me I know. couldn't hit a backhand to save my life
But game 3! You came back strong! That cross-court winner?? 🔥
I surprised myself tbh
I'm just glad you're back. It's not the same without you
thanks girl. I needed this
harpeth river today. best paddle day ever
SO jealous!! I need to try paddleboarding. Next time I am in!
for sure. we are going pretty much every weekend now
Ok so my friend Lisa from book club has been asking me about teeth whitening and I told her I know someone
She wants to know your rates. Can I give her your number? Also she goes to our office so she might mention it at her next cleaning lol
Actually wait should I not? I know you said keep it quiet but she already knows I know a dental person who does it on the side
When are you paying this back.
Jennifer answer me.
I sent $250 today
Why can't you figure this out. You have a good job Jennifer.
Are you even reading these.
$300 sent
I didn't ask for installments.
I called. Pick up.
Tried again. Stop dodging me.
I'll send what I can before christmas
How much.
That's nothing.
I'm done waiting. Pay the $9,000 by March or I'll get a lawyer. I'm serious Jennifer.
I meant what I said. March deadline. Don't push me.
I'm paying. I need more time.
March.
I sent $500. That's all I can do right now.
That's not $9,000.
I have an appointment with a lawyer Tuesday. If you want to settle this without a court filing you have until Monday. Send me what you can and a written plan for the rest. I am done asking.
Hey babe, I was looking at the budget tonight and something's not adding up
We should have paid off another $2K by now. What happened?
what do you mean
I mean the student loan. We've been making payments for months and the balance barely moved
the interest rate went up on the fedloan
they capitalized some interest from the forbearance thing
That still wouldn't account for $2,000 though 🤔
idk babe I'll call them this week and get a breakdown
Ok. I'm not trying to nag I just want us on track ❤️
you're not nagging. we'll figure it out
Hey babe, you've been really quiet the last few days. Is everything ok? ❤️
Just tired. Work was brutal this week.
Ok. I worry about you when you go quiet like that. Want me to pick up dinner tonight?
that would be nice thanks babe
babe come look at something
What? I'm on the couch
come to the office
ok wait let me just send you a pic first
I finally finished it
Wait
Is that our HOUSE?? 😮
I've been working on this for weeks!
3d printed miniature of the duplex
Babe I'm coming to look at this right now
hurry!!
I'm still staring at the duplex model. You got the porch railing and everything 😭❤️
took me 4 tries to get the roof right
Four tries! All those nights in the office
I modeled it in tinkercad from like 50 photos
So THAT'S what all those pictures of the house were for! I thought you were looking at gutters 😂
lol no definitely not gutters
It's going right on the shelf next to the wedding photo
exactly what I was thinking
I'm sending this to my mom. She's going to die ❤️
tell her I'll make one of their house too if she wants
She would LOVE that. You are so talented babe 😭
Did you see the Capital One statement? $1,400?? I thought we were paying that down 🤔
I'll take care of it. Some unexpected stuff came up.
What unexpected stuff?
just some extra expenses. work supplies and stuff. I'll fix it
Jen you haven't answered my texts in two days. What's going on?
I'm fine babe. Just stressed about work. I'll be better this weekend.
Ok. I love you. Just talk to me ok? ❤️
Hey babe, I was thinking about Thanksgiving. Should we invite Tomas?
he has other plans this year
Really? He didn't mention anything to me. Did he tell you what he's doing?
I think hes going to some work thing. company holiday dinner or something
Hmm. You two have barely talked in months 🤔
we're fine. just brother stuff
Jen. I know something is going on with you two. You always say brother stuff
babe its nothing. he's just busy with the company
Ok. I'm not going to push it right now.
thank you
But you know you can talk to me right? About anything ❤️
I know. love you
I need to run to Publix tomorrow for the mole ingredients. Anything else we need?
can you grab heavy cream and brown sugar for the pie
oh and marshmallows
Got it! I'm so excited for Thursday 😊
Just got back from Publix. The mole prep starts now!
already started the cornbread
This kitchen smells amazing 😍
Happy Thanksgiving babe ☀️🦃
happy thanksgiving. turkey goes in at 9
I'll start the mole. This is going to be so good ❤️
Babe how much are you spending on the 3D printing stuff? There's another Amazon box on the porch
just filament. its like $25 a roll
That's the third box this month
I'm working on some projects
What projects? 🤔
a phone case for you actually. and some christmas gifts
Ok that's sweet but can we set a budget for the hobby stuff?
yeah thats fair
I'm not saying stop. I just want to know what we're spending
ok ill keep it under control
Thank you ❤️
whats for dinner
What are we doing for Christmas? Just us this year?
yeah. cook together, video call your family?
Yes! Mom wants to FaceTime in the morning. And I want to make tamales like she does
that sounds perfect
Hey babe did you see the Amazon delivery? 📦
yeah just some stocking stuff
That was a big box for stocking stuff 🤔
ok some of it is from the printer. I made you something
Don't tell me! I love it already 🎄❤️
Hey babe, did you see that insurance explanation thing that came in your email? Who is Holloway Counseling?
oh thats just Candace, my therapist. routine stuff
Oh ok! I didn't realize the practice had a different name
$100 copay though? That seems like a lot
thats the in network rate for outpatient sessions
its not bad compared to what it would be out of pocket
We should look into whether there's a better in-network option. $200 a month adds up 🤔
she IS in network. thats the in network rate
and I dont want to switch Elena
I'm not saying switch! I just didn't realize how much it was. That's all ❤️
sorry. I know youre just looking at the budget
its been a rough week
Babe it's Tuesday 😂
exactly
Lol ok. Love you. Have a good day at work ☀️
Jen I need to talk to you about something
I made a spreadsheet comparing our projected debt payoff to where we actually are
ok
We're $4,200 behind where we should be. That's not a rounding error.
I'll look at it this weekend
You said that last month
I know. work has been insane
I get that but this is our future Jen
can we do a budget night soon? sit down and go through everything
Yes. The 18th? I'll put it on the calendar
sure
I'm not mad. I'm just worried ❤️
Jen? You've been completely checked out this week. I'm worried. Can you call me please?
I'm ok. Just going through a rough patch. Candace is helping me work through some stuff.
Ok... I love you. I'm here whenever you're ready to talk. ❤️
I know. love you too
Thanks for going through the budget with me tonight
of course
I still feel like the numbers are a little off but at least we're talking about it
I'll keep a closer eye on things this month
Ok. I love you. That chicken was amazing by the way 😊
lol thanks. love you too
Jen can I ask you something?
yeah whats up
I need you to be honest with me
ok you're making me nervous
Are we hiding anything from each other financially?
No babe. We're fine.
Because something feels off and I can't put my finger on it
I've just been stressed about work and haven't been as disciplined with the budget. I'll do better
I'm not attacking you. I just feel like the numbers don't match what we planned
I know. I hear you. we'll get it figured out
Ok. I trust you. But I can't ignore this feeling forever
I understand
Happy valentine's day by the way ❤️🍷
happy valentines day babe. love you
Hey babe, our anniversary is coming up next month! 🥂
What should we do? Dinner somewhere nice?
I have something planned. Trust me.
Wait really?? 😮
Should I be excited? 🤔
Very.
Can I get a hint?
nope
Jennifer Lucia Perez you are killing me
good 😊
Ok fine. I trust you. But I'm very intrigued ❤️
you'll love it. I promise
omg its finally warm enough for the boards
paddleboarding this weekend??
YES. I have been waiting all winter for you to say that ☀️
percy priest saturday morning?
Perfect. I will pack snacks 🏄‍♀️
ok pumped up the board and checked everything. we are set for tmrw
Nice! What time are we heading out?
9ish? takes like 20 min to get there
I will drive. SUP fits in the back right?
yeah just barely. bring sunscreen
Good morning! I am so excited ☀️☀️
me tooo loading the board now
that was incredible
I forgot how much I love being on the water
Best morning we have had in months. You looked so peaceful out there ❤️
I really needed that
ok so REI has paddle leashes on clearance and I mighttt have 12 tabs open
Lol of course you do 😂 How much?
the NRS one is $18 and Dakine is $24 but teh reviews on the NRS are way better
Just get the NRS. You will spend three more hours comparing otherwise 😂
also I need a dry bag for my phone. remember when I almost dropped it in the lake
How could I forget? You screamed so loud 😂
ok ordered. NRS leash and sea to summit dry bag. $38 total
harpeth river tmrw??
Yes! Let us do it 🏄‍♀️
up and ready lets gooo
Making coffee. 20 minutes
perfect
that was the best paddle session ive had in months maybe years
The river was so calm. I could have stayed out there all day ❤️
my fitbit says 12k steps somehow lol
Hey babe, I started getting our tax stuff together tonight. Can you pull together everything we are spending? Like all accounts, all cards. I want to make sure we are not missing any deductions
Also can you export that budget spreadsheet? The full thing, not just the summary view
I want to go through every account this year. No surprises
Hey there is a letter from First Horizon Bank on the counter. I have never heard of them. Is that one of ours?
It says checking account ending in 9041. Did you open a new account?

Hi Jennifer, I wanted to check in after our session today. The work you are doing around the financial stress is important. Remember that you are allowed to take care of yourself too. Be kind to yourself this week.
Thank you Candace. I'll try
Jennifer, just checking in after our session today. Remember the 4-7-8 breathing when it gets bad at night. You're doing important work.
Thank you. I'm going to try to actually stick with it this time
That's all we're asking for. One breath at a time.
Thanks
hey jen! are you going to the tdha conference in knoxville this year?
probably not this year. works been crazy
aw ok. let me know if you change your mind, id love to catch up!
Hey Jennifer, got a piece of your mail at the old place. Regions Bank thing. Want me to forward it?
oh thanks! you can just toss it probably just a statement
Jenniferrrr merry christmas!! its been forever. you still in nashville?
hey priya!! yes still here. merry christmas!
we need to catch up! im in atlanta now. maybe ill drive up in the spring?
Hey this is Rick from Halloran Plumbing. I can come by Tuesday between 2-4 for the kitchen faucet
Tuesday works. thanks
All done. Invoice in your email. Call if it leaks again.
Hey girl!! Saw on facebook you hit 10 years as an RDH. Congrats!!
haha thanks keisha! time flies
Has anyone else noticed the dumpster hasnt been emptied since Thursday
yes! I called Allied Waste and they said Monday
Monday?? thats 4 more days
calling the city
Ok team! Holiday potluck Dec 18th. Sign up for what youre bringing
Ill do tamales!
cornbread
Perfect! Dr R said hes ordering pizza too
Courts 3 and 4 reserved for league play Wednesday 6-9pm
sweet see everyone there
Reminder: league fees due by Nov 30
paid!
Ok girls when are we doing dinner?? Its been months
yes!! how about that new place on 12th south
im in. saturday?
Jen? You in?
sure
T-Mobile: Your payment of $160.00 has been received. Thank you.
CVS: Your prescription is ready for pickup at 1000 Gallatin Ave, Nashville.
Your Amazon order has been delivered to front door.
any update
Xfinity: Service has been restored in your area. We apologize for the inconvenience.
Xfinity: We detected an outage in your area. Our team is working to restore service.

Reminder: You have an appointment with Dr. Patel on 1/22 at 10:30 AM. Reply C to confirm.
C
REI: Fall Clearance starts now! Up to 50% off select gear. Shop in-store or online.
Hi Jennifer! Voting matters for TN families. Make your voice heard Nov 4. Paid for by TN Families First PAC. Reply STOP to opt out
Nashville SC: 2026 season kicks off Feb 28! Get your tickets now. Use code NSC2026 for 15% off
hey jen. havent heard from you in a while. hope youre doing ok
thinking of you. text me when you can
Mija, feliz navidad! Your mom says youre not coming to Houston this year. We miss you
Send Elena our love too
Nashville Public Library: Your hold 'Baking From My Home to Yours' is ready for pickup at Germantown branch.
Piedmont Natural Gas: Your Feb statement is ready. Amount due: $87.42. Due 2/28.
yo jen we got enough for 5v5 saturday. you in?
cant this week. next time
